title: bauhinia glandulosa
intro: Bauhinia glandulosa, also known as the purple bauhinia or orange hill, is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia glandulosa include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Bauhinia glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
